name: app
//overrides: Force uuid >= 11.1.1 (GHSA-w5hq-g745-h8pq, contrôle de bornes). Seul conso = xcode@3.0.1 (génération projet iOS, build-time, jamais exécuté par 'expo export -p web') via @expo/config-plugins ; il appelle uuid.v4(), named export conservé en v11 → compatible.

scripts.build:web: node scripts/prepare-embeddings-assets.mjs && expo export -p web && node scripts/patch-pwa.mjs && node scripts/prerender-seo.mjs && node scripts/strip-model-for-pages.mjs
scripts.deploy:pages: node scripts/check-data-freshness.mjs && node scripts/split-data-site.mjs && npx wrangler pages deploy .data-site --project-name=scrutoir-data --branch=main --commit-dirty=true && npx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name=scrutoir --branch=main --commit-dirty=true
